metadata.name: Process a Customer Credit Card Payment

description: A customer wants to pay their open invoice using a credit card over the phone.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and the invoice they wish to pay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the correct open invoice.

nodes.task_description: Securely capture the customer's credit card information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uses a secure payment portal to enter the card details.

nodes.task_description: Process the credit card transaction through the payment gateway.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives a successful authorization code from the gateway.

nodes.task_description: Apply the payment to close the invoice and record the credit card processing fee as an expense.

expected_outcome.value: Agent applies the cash and posts the associated bank fee.
